title: Auto-Categorisation on Import
summary: Automatically assign a category to imported transactions based on description matching. Matching strategy and UX approach still open.

title: Resilient / Format-Agnostic Transaction Import
summary: Make the import pipeline durable against bank export format changes. Minimum: handle small variations without code fixes. Ambitious: fully format-agnostic importer.

title: Google Auth Migration
summary: Replace username/password auth with Google OAuth and eventually decommission password-based login entirely.

title: Analytics, Logging, and Observability
summary: Per-user interaction logging, GA frontend tracking, and OpenTelemetry instrumentation in a separate analytics DB. Storage choice TBD.

title: Everycent MCP Server
summary: Build an MCP server as the reporting/querying layer. Users ask natural language questions via any MCP client. Possible alternative transaction ingestion path. Likely built in Go.
